Package us.crazycrew.crazycore.paper.player

Class PaperPlayer

java.lang.Object
us.crazycrew.crazycore.registry.keys.Keyed
us.crazycrew.crazycore.registry.senders.types.Sender
us.crazycrew.crazycore.player.CrazyPlayer
us.crazycrew.crazycore.paper.player.PaperPlayer
All Implemented Interfaces:
net.kyori.adventure.audience.Audience, net.kyori.adventure.pointer.Pointered
public class PaperPlayer extends us.crazycrew.crazycore.player.CrazyPlayer
Allows to obtain uuids, names or send messages.
